eventBoundary: Expected normalized event examples for controlled validation only. Not production validation.

events.title: DTS 4160 Time Synchronization Alarm Sample Active
events.description: Known DTS 4160 active sample indicates GNSS sync lost, no valid time source, and no DTS link according to R1 derived evidence.
events.operationalImpact: Potential time synchronization degradation affecting systems that depend on the master clock. This is a sample-confirmed validation event, not a live production outage claim.
events.recommendedAction: Investigate grandmaster time source, GNSS synchronization, and DTS link condition; confirm live state and site asset location before dispatch.

faultCandidate.reason: Known active sample decodes to three sample-confirmed time synchronization alarms.

workOrderRecommendation.summary: Review DTS 4160 synchronization health if this state is observed on a live system.

evidenceFields.sourceDocumentReference: Derived from R1 DTS4160 SNMP evidence pack; raw customer documents are not included.

events.title: DTS 4160 Alarm Mask Clear Sample
events.description: Known DTS 4160 clear sample indicates no active decoded alarms according to R1 derived evidence.
events.operationalImpact: No active DTS 4160 alarm indicated by this sample.
events.recommendedAction: No work order recommendation from the clear sample alone.

faultCandidate.reason: Known clear sample has no decoded alarms.

workOrderRecommendation.summary: No work order recommendation from this clear sample alone.

evidenceFields.sourceDocumentReference: Derived from R1 DTS4160 SNMP evidence pack; raw customer documents are not included.

events.title: DTS 4160 Unvalidated Non-Zero Alarm Mask
events.description: Synthetic guardrail event. A non-zero sample other than the known active sample must not produce invented decoded alarm labels.
events.operationalImpact: Unvalidated sample; production impact cannot be inferred without MIB confirmation.
events.recommendedAction: Capture vendor MIB, bit order, byte order, and customer samples before expanding decoder behavior.

faultCandidate.reason: Alarm labels are not inferred for unvalidated non-zero values.

workOrderRecommendation.summary: Do not create work order from unvalidated synthetic guardrail sample.

evidenceFields.sourceDocumentReference: Synthetic R2 guardrail fixture; not customer evidence.
